script_text: Two stories can be alike in some ways and different in others.
We compare to see what is the same.
We contrast to see what is different.
Story one. A bear looks for honey.
Story two. A bee makes honey.
What is the same? Both are about honey!
What is different? One finds it, one makes it.
Story one. Amy is brave and climbs a mountain.
Story two. Bob is brave and swims a lake.
Ask, what do both stories share? Then ask, what is special about each one?
Now you are ready to practice comparing stories!
